Our Story

Dewmix — Building Kenya
One Project at a Time

Based in Kenol, Murang'a along the Nyeri–Nairobi Highway, Dewmix Hardware is your trusted one-stop hardware partner. From a Nairobi apartment renovation to a Nyeri construction site — we stock what Kenya builds with.

We serve contractors, plumbers, fundis and homeowners across all 47 counties — wholesale pricing for bulk buyers, retail convenience for everyone.

Dewmix Hardware — officially trading as Dewmix Aquatic Solution — is your trusted hardware and building supplies partner, located in Kenol, Murang'a, along the Nyeri–Nairobi Highway. Our promise: Building With The Best.

We serve Kenyan builders, contractors, plumbers, fundis, interior designers and homeowners with over 1,160 quality products across 19 categories. Whether you're constructing a flat in Syokimau, renovating a home in Karen, or building a hotel in Diani — Dewmix has you covered.

We offer wholesale pricing for contractors and bulk buyers, and retail availability for homeowners and walk-in customers. No prices shown online — we quote fairly for every customer type. Simply WhatsApp or call us.
